ambiguities: Blinded content does not specify whether segment-level Prioritize is implied within Classify or is a distinct step when multiple customer segments or revenue streams are present.
Evaluate is described as assessing both coherence and viability simultaneously; it is unclear whether these warrant separate primitive instances or sub-steps.
notes: The artifact maps cleanly onto a structured classification-first workflow. Bound scopes the focal organization or offering. Classify partitions the nine canonical blocks (or equivalent value-creation/delivery/sustainability elements). Observe surfaces current-state data per block. Interpret derives relational meaning across blocks. Generate produces hypotheses about fit and model logic. Evaluate tests coherence (internal consistency) and viability (external sustainability). A remediation loop returns to Interpret if evaluation fails. Communicate externalizes the resulting model. Prioritize is a candidate missing primitive for ranking competing hypotheses or segment importance but is not explicitly required by the blinded procedural content.
